title: THEORY Sri-Yantra-.svg
description:
THEORY, acronim of "The Holy Eye Of Revelation Yantra", is appreciated as the first exact and complete solution of the Sri Chakra yantra since the year 2009, i.e. what was never achieved before.

It was obtained by special disclosed algorithms, with no limits to the decimal places needed for calculations; such remain just the limits of the available devices, whilst there are no boundaries to the precision obtainable by the THEORY program.

This new domain deepens and helps to discover some of that yantra's unknown properties as well as its most correct structure, wholly based on the Golden Ratio expansion pattern. An advanced OpenGL 3D graphic animation (exe file only), is given free and dedicated to meditation as a vibrating and powerful cosmic object.

A detailed plan in the highest 7143 × 7143 pt. resolution has been prepared - for architectural purposes also - and made available there in a full and rich PDF, which a good Reader should be able to zoom at least up to 6400%, in order to check the maximum drawing accuracy.
